claim_boundary: Planning artifact only. No runtime promotion or full locked claim until selector passes subset gates and then validates on a larger/full split.

problem_statement.p119_recall_possible: Low score thresholds can pass center and tiny-IoU gates.
problem_statement.p119_inflation_blocker: The same low thresholds exceed candidate inflation gate.
problem_statement.p120_simple_score_limit: Fine score thresholding cannot pass center, tiny-IoU, and inflation together.
problem_statement.needed: A selector/compressor that uses runtime-available candidate structure/support features, not gold labels, to remove redundant false positives while preserving true center/tiny coverage.

runtime_allowed_features: page-normalized bbox center and area when page extent is inferable from prediction set
tile scale parsed from tile_id such as s384/s640
max IoU with higher-score same-label candidate
max IoU with higher-score any-label candidate
page candidate count and label candidate count
runtime_forbidden_features: SVG geometry or semantic_type/raw_label as runtime signal
any field derived from expected_json during inference

offline_labels_for_training_only.positive_center: candidate covers a gold symbol center
offline_labels_for_training_only.positive_iou: candidate IoU with a gold symbol >= 0.30
offline_labels_for_training_only.negative: candidate does not satisfy any positive condition and is not needed by a selected gold target
offline_labels_for_training_only.grouping: page/listwise groups by row_id; split must be by row/page, not candidate

candidate_policy_to_try.name: score_plus_support_rules_baseline
candidate_policy_to_try.description: Non-learned compression baseline using score rank, same-label NMS support, per-label budgets, and local duplicate density.
candidate_policy_to_try.why_first: Fast, auditable, no sklearn dependency, good sanity baseline before training.

candidate_policy_to_try.name: sklearn_listwise_or_pairwise_selector
candidate_policy_to_try.description: Train candidate keep/drop model on runtime features, then enforce per-page budget/rank constraints.
candidate_policy_to_try.why_second: May recover near-miss gap between score=0.006 and score=0.008 by dropping low-support false positives.

recommended_next_task.goal: Build a selector dataset from P119 predictions and reconstructed subset golds with runtime-only features plus offline labels.
